channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: JPMorgan CFO warns stablecoins risk becoming ‘regulatory arbitrage’ play
item.description: During the bank's earnings call on Tuesday, JPMorgan CFO Jeremy Barnum warned that stablecoins could become a tool for regulatory arbitrage unless they are held to the same strict oversight and consumer protection standards as traditional …

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Ethereum (ETH) price rises 5.4%
item.description: Aave (AAVE), up 3.6% from Monday, joined Ethereum as a top performer.

item.title: X product chief Nikita Bier teases a crypto ‘fix’ amid market slump
item.description: X product chief Nikita Bier teases a crypto “fix” product as speculation grows around an X Money rollout this month, a potential Bitcoin revival and Bier’s Solana ties.

item.title: XRP Ledger adds zero-knowledge proofs targeting institutional privacy gap
item.description: The Boundless integration enables private transaction execution on XRPL while maintaining compliance, addressing what the company calls the "transparency tax" that has held back institutional adoption of public blockchains.

item.title: From DeFi to deep space: How SkyMapper and Avalanche are securing the world's telescope records
item.description: SkyMapper has introduced a dedicated Avalanche-based network that records observations from telescopes around the world, turning each data point into a secure, verifiable digital record.

item.title: XRP Ledger taps Boundless for bank-grade privacy on public blockchains
item.description: XRPL is integrating Boundless’ zero-knowledge tech into its base layer, stepping into the race to offer banks confidential onchain transactions without losing regulatory visibility.

item.title: Bitcoin rises to one-month high above $75,000 as analysts eye major breakout
item.description: Several crypto market experts explain what might happen if bitcoin manages to hold $75,000, and if it does not.

item.title: Tether introduces crypto wallet to bring stablecoin and bitcoin payments directly to users
item.description: The stablecoin issuer's crypto wallet lets users send digital dollars, tokenized gold and bitcoin without intermediaries or gas tokens across multiple blockchains.

item.title: Visa throws its weight behind Stripe’s Tempo blockchain
item.description: The card network configured and managed the validator node entirely in-house, it said, following six months of joint work with Tempo’s engineering team.

item.title: Bitcoin passes halfway point in halving cycle as price gains trail prior cycles
item.description: Slower post-halving gains reflect bitcoin’s shift toward a more mature asset.

item.title: Deutsche Börse Acquires Kraken Stake in $200M Deal
item.description: The Frankfurt exchange operator's investment values Kraken at $13.3 billion, as TradFi giants race to secure footholds in crypto.

item.title: Morning Minute: The SEC Just Gave DeFi The Green Light
item.description: Bitcoin and Ethereum are pumping. DeFi is winning. Saylor is buying big. And Kraken is getting extorted.

item.title: Deutsche Börse invests $200 million in Kraken parent Payward
item.description: Deutsche Börse said it will invest $200 million in Kraken’s parent company for a fully diluted stake of 1.5%, subject to regulatory approval.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether in Goldilocks rally while smaller coins take a back seat
item.description: What you need to know for April 14, 2026

item.title: OneCoin victims get a $40 million lifeline more than a decade after the scam began
item.description: The Department of Justice said it has $40 million in seized assets for victim compensation and it will continue working to seize further criminal proceeds for the defrauded investors

item.title: A fake Ledger app on the Apple App Store drained $9.5 million in crypto
item.description: A malicious Ledger Live clone slipped onto Apple’s App Store, draining millions from dozens of victims across multiple blockchains in a week-long phishing campaign.

item.title: Bitcoin Nears $75K As Risk-on Sentiment, Geopolitical Landscape Improves
item.description: Bitcoin’s push towards $75K comes amid declining bearish options flow and spot buying, with analysts leaning slightly bullish.

item.title: Deutsche Börse takes 1.5% stake in crypto exchange Kraken for $200 million
item.description: Deutsche Börse teamed up with Kraken in December to bridge traditional and digital markets and help expedite institutional cryptocurrency adoption in Europe.

item.title: 🚨 XRP GAINS ACCESS TO JAPAN’S 44M USERS Japanese crypto giant Rakuten Wallet launches $XRP as a listed asset and payment, letting users buy XRP with loyalty points and spend it across Japan. The integration connects XRP to Japan's everyday co - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE1YTUFzbGtsWHI3RVJpSmJiMmpDck4yQ280TzQ0TlUtdWl6YVdfUVQ3MmZPSjVjc3F6UnV0ZUVtRVNDRk41MkFNSDY3a1ViblpXZkEtYlZzSk1sWFg0V3YyRg?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 XRP GAINS ACCESS TO JAPAN’S 44M U…

item.title: Bitcoin tests $75,000 as $200 million in shorts face liquidation risk
item.description: Bitcoin price approaches $75,000 level with $200 million in shorts at risk of liquidation, rising open interest and shifting volatility dynamics in focus.

item.title: Nauru taps Bitcoiner Dadvan Yousuf for trade role in digital asset push
item.description: Nauru moves from building rules to promoting its digital asset framework as it looks to attract companies and cross-border partnerships.

item.title: Bank of Korea nominee backs central bank-led digital currency, sees limited role for stablecoins
item.description: The nominee, Shin Huyn-song, supported a central bank digital currency model, emphasizing the need for strict anti-money laundering and compliance controls.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs clock $291M outflows as BTC blasts past $74K
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $291 million in outflows on Monday as BTC climbed above $74,000, marking the biggest day of redemptions since March 27, led by FBTC.

item.title: Strategy's STRC sees record-breaking trading day, may surpass that on Tuesday
item.description: Estimated bitcoin purchase from STRC of around 7,800 BTC could mark the largest single-day addition since the preferred stock's debut.

item.title: DOJ Opens $40M Compensation Process for OneCoin Crypto Fraud Victims
item.description: Victims of the $4 billion OneCoin scam can petition for the opportunity to recover funds from over $40 million in forfeited assets.

item.title: Web3 hacks cost $482M in Q1 as phishing drives majority of losses: Hacken
item.description: Hacken’s Q1 2026 report finds $482 million lost across 44 incidents, with phishing, legacy code bugs and key compromises driving losses as regulators tighten security demands.

item.title: Here are key bitcoin price levels to watch as the rally gathers steam
item.description: BTC's price has hit four-week highs above $74,000. Here are next key levels that could amplify volatility or create resistance.

item.title: UK Lib Dems call for probe into Farage over $2.7M Stack BTC promotion
item.description: UK Liberal Democrats called on the FCA to examine Nigel Farage’s Stack BTC promotion as scrutiny grows over crypto conflicts and political donations.

item.title: THIS CAT IS LONG $7.45 MILLION OF CRYPTO This cat CL207 is currently up $709,000 longing BTC, ETH, HYPE, MON and PEPE. He’s up $1.27M in the last week. Will his streak continue? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBGRDdKa3RoZnRFQThBVzI2cWsxdXZSblJfRzBvTmZMVXRVX2FrYWlSY3pXRE1ZU0I1dldtSmoyeHg3a3RHNWFMaV9mODdXRUEtZkQ0djFqekZmLTg?oc=5" target="_blank">THIS CAT IS LONG $7.45 MILLION OF CRYPTO Th…

item.title: NFT bull Steve Aoki sells his SHIB, ETH, and PEPE. His Bored Apes are down 88%.
item.description: The DJ who told CoinDesk in 2021 that NFTs would be "part of culture" within five years is quietly exiting crypto.

item.title: Nikita Bier says crypto has had a rough year, hints at building something new as X Money launch nears
item.description: The head of product's viral one-liner lands weeks before Elon Musk's fiat payments app goes live with a 6% yield and a Visa card

item.title: US Justice Department opens compensation for victims of $4B OneCoin crypto fraud
item.description: OneCoin was launched by Ruja Ignatova and Karl Sebastian Greenwood in Bulgaria. Ignatova has been missing since 2017, and Greenwood was sentenced to 20 years in prison.

item.title: Little-known token ranks alongside bitcoin and ether in the top three — just not in the way you think
item.description: RAVE has surged several thousand percent in seven days, driving frenzied trading activity and large liquidations, second only to industry leaders bitcoin and ether.

item.title: Japan's central bank cools rate hike expectations, removing a key risk for bitcoin's rally
item.description: The BOJ's dovish shift keeps the yen carry trade alive, the same trade whose unwind crashed bitcoin 24% in two days in August 2024.

item.title: Bitcoin bears eye $50K bottom as analysts claim final flush still to come
item.description: Bitcoin falling to the $50,000 level is being seen as the “last significant accumulation zone” before any sustained recovery, says LVRG Research director Nick Ruck.

item.title: Banks challenge White House report on stablecoin yields
item.description: The American Bankers Association is concerned that stablecoin yields would lead to mass deposit outflows from smaller community banks.

item.title: JUST IN: X Head of Product Nikita Bier says "crypto has had a rough year." "Maybe we should launch something to fix it." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9McURRWUdWc3FsNkNacnQ4ZHY1TXB3VWNsaXdoZEJqZnd2OWxHemVpdXREa0RwQmhKYXJwVXJCQnVKMVZiODhzQmVrejV1QnhuWmEyemFoMjVqUTRfRDR5VnJn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: X Head of Product Nikita …

item.title: 🚨 LATEST: X Head of Product Nikita Bier says, “Crypto has had a rough year. Maybe we should launch something to fix it.” What could it be? 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBsTVJnOV9qVG5Bb2tSNExzY2N2SGhrdVM5RXZfVzc4LURiQzFvTFdTeXhBWUNfR050NjRncm9uY2hSLVdrYWFFVUgxMU5yaFJaWlhLYkhzM1ZGcE9yYnBJUWJBQ2g?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 LATEST: X Head of Product Ni…

item.title: Crypto has had a rough year. Maybe we should launch something to fix it. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFA0UFd0Zmh5LWdaYWJDMnlEbmVId1VBQjZmSkEybTR2NkhmSVlMZlBSSjFUWGFKZkxPeVltTzQtTm9TV29DTjJHOUl5WEFRNWgzdTdvdFJpbkRmOWVtSEQ2Wg?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto has had a rough year. Maybe w…

item.title: Former CFTC Chair Giancarlo leaves law to focus on crypto advisory
item.description: Chris Giancarlo, who oversaw the first Bitcoin futures ETF approval as CFTC chairman, will now advise fintech and digital asset founders and boards.

item.title: Bitcoin nears $75K as Iran deal hopes spark $400M short squeeze
item.description: A broad hope for a US deal with Iran to end weeks of conflict has spurred investor confidence in riskier assets.

item.title: South Korea fines Coinone $3.5M, orders partial business suspension: Reports
item.description: Coinone is the second to face South Korea’s crackdown on exchanges in the last month, following a $24 million fine and a six-month partial suspension order against Bithumb.

item.title: Foundry launches Zcash mining pool, notches 29% hashrate in first month
item.description: The launch of Foundry Zcash Pool has cut ViaBTC’s mining pool hashrate dominance from around 65% to 37%.

item.title: Ether holders back in profit as ETH price aims for rally to $3K
item.description: Large Ether investors are back in profit, increasing the chances of a rally toward $3,000, but resistance at $2,800 may delay the recovery.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin now projected to reclaim $90,000 this year. 52% chance. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE9MRmMxM0FtSm1HR2xjcHVSQlNRSzRueUM1VXpkMFg1b2tGM2oyMWN5VDFQUWs4cUxMM2JnQS16eHpVV1JvdHFjMm8zY0REMm05RmtpNnNVS2pkT0VoZEN4Ug?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin now projected to r…

item.title: JUST IN: $175,000,000 worth of shorts liquidated from the crypto market in the past 60 minutes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE91LVJUZHpiRnNoVmZLZUJmVXZXYzNaQ3VDLUFWbW1rSERqZEpQYng5WkhyRHFfTlp4M2pVQm81SGJLWFB1RHpQU29CZ09rTVp4Q29weE94MHJNUVBqY3BiSEFB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $175,000,000 worth of sho…

item.title: Bitcoin reclaims $74K as spot ETF demand clashes with BTC miner sell pressure
item.description: Bitcoin rallied above $74,000 after the Monday stock market close, but derivatives data show that some traders remain bearish.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin extends gains to +5% on the day and rises above $74,000. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE52Zi1NdGxrNi11VVB1MllrcVdlaE5VYktDUlVzYnJ1eFNSQVRZbFA4OFd1SlNOb2pVQUhPVWktWFpjanc1MG1GMVR0REpndjdSMElqNDVHREF6NG1jamVHOWdJcURwdw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin extends ga…

item.title: Broadridge rolls out crypto, tokenized asset platform for Canada wealth managers
item.description: The technology services provider said wealth managers have faced challenges integrating digital assets without relying on separate systems.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Crypto.com Reveals $1 Million in CRO Fighter Bonuses for White House UFC Fight
item.description: The crypto exchange will distribute a record $1 million Cronos (CRO) fighter bonus pool at the upcoming UFC fight at the White House.

item.title: SEC proposes certain crypto interfaces don’t need to register as brokers
item.description: Hester Peirce, who heads the SEC’s crypto task force, said that the staff statement represented “expansive readings of the securities laws“ in response to digital assets.

item.title: Japan's Tech Titans Just Teamed Up to Build a Trillion-Parameter AI—And It's Not Here to Chat
item.description: SoftBank, Sony, Honda, and NEC have formed a new company to build physical AI for robots and machines, backed by $6.7 billion in government funding.

item.title: 'Dramatic Change': Starknet Creator Reveals Layoffs Amid Revenue-Focused Pivot
item.description: StarkWare co-founder and CEO Eli Ben-Sasson said the firm building on Ethereum slashed its headcount in a move to prioritize revenue.

item.title: MiniMax Drops State-of-the-Art AI Agent Model—Then Quietly Changes the License
item.description: MiniMax M2.7 rivals Claude Opus on key coding benchmarks, but the Chinese AI lab updated commercial terms shortly after releasing the weights on Hugging Face.

item.title: Bitmine ramps up Ether buys, pushes holdings toward 5% of total supply
item.description: While others refrain from boosting their Ether holdings, Bitmine's latest purchase gives it ownership of about 4% of total supply as the company expands its staking strategy.

item.title: New Pro-DeFi Policies Show the SEC Isn't Waiting for Congress to Act on Crypto
item.description: The SEC released a new, permissive policy on DeFi interfaces Monday that was immediately celebrated by crypto industry leaders.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin pumps back above $73,007! 🟢 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5MaWZOUnp4VjcwVGJoNVFOQUlSNllzdEloMUE3eC1Pc1d6TDJTaWF1VUZyV21OdnpYeW9sUzNKaUFNbU1rekhNUFUwZlY3ajctM1RCQXdfb2xyUWhPYTRpd1hzQ2JWNmc?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin pumps back…

item.title: Polymarket Trader Turns $500 Into $252K After UFC Makes Yet Another Scoring Error
item.description: A Polymarket trader walked away with $252,000 in profits after taking advantage of the UFC’s latest “scoring error.”

item.title: 'We Will Not Pay These Criminals': Crypto Exchange Kraken Is Being Extorted Over Stolen Data
item.description: Crypto exchange Kraken says it's being extorted over stolen customer data, but won't yield to the criminals or negotiate.
